title: Iran and Hezbollah launch new attacks on Israel as war also threatens power plants
At least five killed in massive wave of Russian strikes across Ukraine, officials say
Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Fires Missile Barrage at Israel After U.S. Claims Progress on Talks
text: Israeli officials said missiles launched from Iran had hit Tel Aviv and other parts of the country. President Trump said there had been “very strong talks” with Iran to end the war, though Iranian officials did not confirm that.
